note: Re-opened official D.C. Council code site: § 1-204.51(a) confirms 'No contract involving expenditures out of an appropriation which is available for more than 1 year shall be made for a period of more than 5 years' absent two-thirds Council vote; (c) requires Council approval of multiyear contracts within 45 days. § 2-355.04 confirms 12-month default ceiling unless authorized by appropriations act or § 1-204.51. § 2-354.02(a) confirms contracts >$100,000 'shall be awarded by competitive sealed bidding' absent CPO D&F. 27 DCMR § 2005.2 confirms 1-year base + total 5-year base+option cap absent Director D&F; § 2005.3 confirms option price must be readily discernible. § 38-1802.04(c)(1)(A) confirms charter LEA 7-day RFP notice in D.C. Register and newspapers for contracts ≥$25,000. All controlling text matches the claimed answers.
